name: Arcana Force 0 - The Fool
name_jp: アルカナフォース<ruby lang="jp"><rb>０</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ゼロ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＴＨＥ ＦＯＯＬ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ザ・フール</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
Cannot be destroyed by battle. Cannot be changed to Defense Position. If this card is Summoned: Toss a coin.
● Heads: Negate your card effects that target this card, and if you do, destroy them.
● Tails: Negate your opponent's card effects that target this card, and if you do, destroy them.
